questions.q: What is the name of Dexter's inner monologue voice that drives his homicidal urges?
Which novel by Jeff Lindsay served as the primary source material for Dexter Season 1?
In which season does Rita announce her pregnancy to Dexter?
What is the name of Dexter's forensic specialty that he uses as his cover at Miami Metro Police?
Who is Dexter's biological sister working in law enforcement?
What is the name of Dexter's code that guides his killing—established by his adoptive father?
In Season 2, to which body of water does Dexter dispose of his victims wrapped in plastic?
Who is Dexter's adoptive father who appears to him as a vision throughout the series?
Which law enforcement agency is Dexter employed by in Miami?
What is the occupation of Rita's mother that puts her in constant conflict with Dexter?
What fake name does Dexter use when purchasing his disposal supplies?
Which season features the Ice Truck Killer as the primary antagonist?
What is the name of Dexter's first serious romantic interest introduced in Season 5?
Which real-life serial killer's characteristics partially inspired the character of the Trinity Killer?
What does Dexter whisper at the beginning of the series pilot episode?
What is the primary relationship dynamic between Dexter and Detective James Doakes?
In which city does the majority of the original series take place?
How many trophies from his victims did Dexter keep hidden before they were discovered?
What is the name of the serial killer known as the Bay Harbor Butcher in Season 2?
Which actor portrayed the Trinity Killer, one of Dexter's most dangerous adversaries?
What item does the Trinity Killer leave at his crime scenes?
Who is the serial killer known for skinning his victims, earning the nickname 'The Skinner'?
What fake identity does Dexter create to get close to his victims?
choices: He poses as a fellow killer
He poses as a blood analyst interested in learning about them

questions.q: Which character's murder conviction does Dexter orchestrate in Season 2 to become the Bay Harbor Butcher?
In Season 5, what is the primary motivation driving Lumen Pierce to participate in Dexter's killing ritual?
choices: Desire to become a serial killer
Revenge against her captors and rapists

questions.q: What is the name of the fictional book series that inspired the creation of the Dexter television show?
choices: Dexter's Dark Code by Michael C. Hall
Darkly Dreaming Dexter by Jeff Lindsay

questions.q: In Season 6, which delusional serial killer duo does Dexter pursue who believe they are following a religious calling?
choices: Travis Marshall and Professor James Gellar

questions.q: What body disposal method does Dexter employ most frequently throughout the series?
choices: Disposing bodies in the Atlantic Ocean via boat

questions.q: In Season 5, what alias does Dexter use for his apartment rental in order to establish a separate living space?
Which real-life serial killer and corrupt police officer's story partially inspired the character of Dexter Morgan?
What psychiatric manipulation does Dr. Emmett Meridian use in Season 1 to drive his female patients to violence?
choices: He convinces them they are beyond help and should end their lives
He prescribes medications that cause violent reactions
He creates false memories of trauma
He induces paranoid delusions about their families

questions.q: In Season 7, what is the primary reason Debra Morgan's storyline takes a devastating turn involving Oliver Saxon?
choices: Saxon kills her at Dexter's apartment
Saxon destroys her career through blackmail

questions.q: Which rapper and poet, known for his work as MF DOOM's collaborator, portrays the character Brother Sam in Season 6?
In Season 2, what is the street name given to Dexter by the media for his serial killing activities?
What is Dexter's primary rule of conduct as a serial killer?
choices: Only kill those who deserve it

questions.q: In Season 3, which Miami detective becomes Dexter's killing partner after bonding over a shared case?

In Season 8, who fires the fatal shot that results in Debra Morgan's tragic death?
In Season 4, what is the name of the serial killer that John Lithgow portrays?
What is the name of Dexter's boat, which he uses for disposing of bodies?
Which Miami Metro detective becomes suspicious of Dexter's behavior in Season 2?
What does Dexter's adoptive father Harry represent in his internal monologues?
In Season 1, who is revealed to be the Ice Truck Killer?
What Latin word meaning 'right' is the origin of Dexter's name?
In Season 3, Miguel Prado discovers Dexter's secret. What is Miguel's profession?
What ritual does the Trinity Killer perform before each murder?
In Season 7, Professor Gellar is a manipulative figure to which character?
Which character does Dexter kill in the pilot episode as his first on-screen murder?
In Season 1, what item does Dexter collect from his victims as trophies?
What is Rita's maiden name?
In Season 4, what is the name of the forensic lab technician who works with Dexter?
Which season introduces Oliver Saxon, a character who becomes aware of Dexter's true nature?
In Season 2, where does Dexter dispose of bodies instead of the ocean?

Which actress plays Lumen Pierce, a woman who becomes involved in Dexter's vigilante activities during Season 5?
